ent-RMCPlatformStairRight = platform
    .desc = A square metal surface resting on four legs.

    .desc = A square metal surface resting on four legs.

    .desc = A square metal surface resting on four legs. It has been destroyed.

ent-RMCPlatformStrataStair = raised metal edge
    .desc = A raised level of metal, often used to elevate areas above others. You could probably climb it.

ent-RMCPropVehicleMonoSupronOrangeFlipped = Mono-Supron
    .desc = The 'Mono-Supron', a mass-produced civilian vehicle for the colonial markets, in and outside of the United Nations. Produced by 'Mizutani' a car marque and associated operating division of the Weston-Yamada Corporation.
